findings.title: Pipeline Consolidation Summary
findings.description: Consolidated 40 findings from 7 agents into 30 unique findings. Removed 10 duplicates. Identified 3 cross-agent conflicts.

findings.title: Top Priority Findings
findings.description: Highest priority items based on weighted scoring (user_impact×0.35 + business_value×0.30) / (effort×0.20 + risk×0.15): North Star Metric: User Engagement (score=3.444); Primary KPI: Notification Click-Through Rate (CTR) (score=3.059); Pricing Sensitivity in Competitive Landscape (score=2.973); Desire for Digest-Style Summaries (score=2.958); Need for Notification Priority Levels (score=2.882)

findings.title: Cross-Agent Conflict Resolution Report
findings.description: Resolved 3 conflicts between agent findings. risk-002 vs requirements-002: Critical push notification delivery issues on Android 14 must be resolved, but existing risks indicate failures in delivery.; risk-004 vs customer-005: Accessibility concerns in the notification center are flagged as a risk, while users report significant accessibility issues.; risk-003 vs competitive-004: Pricing sensitivity is flagged as a critical risk, yet SmartNotify's pricing is lower than competitors, which could lead to sustainability issues.

evidence.excerpt: Critical push notification delivery issues on Android 14 must be resolved, but existing risks indicate failures in delivery.
Accessibility concerns in the notification center are flagged as a risk, while users report significant accessibility issues.
Pricing sensitivity is flagged as a critical risk, yet SmartNotify's pricing is lower than competitors, which could lead to sustainability issues.

conflicts.description: Critical push notification delivery issues on Android 14 must be resolved, but existing risks indicate failures in delivery.
conflicts.resolution: Prioritize fixing the push notification delivery issues on Android 14 before implementing new features.
conflicts.reasoning: Addressing critical delivery issues is essential to maintain user trust and engagement, which must take precedence over feature enhancements.

conflicts.description: Accessibility concerns in the notification center are flagged as a risk, while users report significant accessibility issues.
conflicts.resolution: Implement an accessibility audit and redesign of the notification center to address reported issues immediately.
conflicts.reasoning: Given the critical nature of accessibility for user engagement and compliance, resolving these issues should be prioritized.

conflicts.description: Pricing sensitivity is flagged as a critical risk, yet SmartNotify's pricing is lower than competitors, which could lead to sustainability issues.
conflicts.resolution: Conduct a pricing strategy review to ensure competitiveness while maintaining profitability, potentially adjusting pricing based on user feedback.
conflicts.reasoning: Balancing competitive pricing with financial viability is crucial to avoid long-term risks associated with pricing strategies.

summary: Consolidated 40 findings into 30 unique items. Removed 10 duplicates, resolved 3 conflicts. Top priority: North Star Metric: User Engagement.
